page.title: Plugg
page.intro: Welcome! On this page you will find everything you need to get through your years at LTH.
page.contact_notice_text: If you want to contribute material, report issues or have other questions, send us an email at plugg@fsektionen.se (or click this box).
page.section_programs_text: Use the top row in the navbar to switch between programmes and reveal each programme year.
page.section_courses_text: Each programme year has its own course dropdown. Pick a course to jump directly to relevant material.
page.section_specialisations_text: Specialisations are grouped per programme in separate dropdowns for fast access.
page.footer_note: Do you like design or code? Do you think you could improve this page or help with new features for the web, server or app? Apply to spindelman next fall semester!
